sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60229" key="krumw/ssw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρῡμ-ώσσω</orth>, <sense id="n60229.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be stiff with cold</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">21</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
